ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Code of the district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the district */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the district */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the district data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the county is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the county data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the field is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the field */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the field */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the field in square meters */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the field */,
  "geology_type" TEXT /* Type of geology in the field */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the field data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formations" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation */,
  "formation_name" TEXT /* Name of the geological formation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the formation */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the formation in millions of years */,
  "layer_depth" REAL /* Depth of the formation layer in meters */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Main composition of the formation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the formation data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field where the sample was collected */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geological formation of the sample */,
  "avg_concentration" REAL /* Average concentration of the mineral in the sample */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector who collected the sample */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sample location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sample location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sample location */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "mineral_type" TEXT /* Type of mineral in the sample */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the sample data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the sample data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the collector belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the collector */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the collector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the collector data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the analysis location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the analysis location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the analysis location */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the analysis data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the analysis data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
